protocol: Two-score with v1.1 annotation guide (tightened Full/Partial boundary)

J1-1.rationale: Config options for caching exist but no step-by-step guide for persistent compile cache across restarts

J1-3.rationale: No doc addresses DDP+AMP+compile three-way interaction. Eager concepts without compile-specific page

J1-15.rationale: Export docs cover limitations generally but don't address torch.autograd.grad compatibility specifically

J2-8.rationale: FlexAttention API page exists but is pure API reference — zero content on backward pass performance

J2-9.rationale: FAQ covers general debugging but never addresses decoder/autoregressive model pattern specifically

J2-20.rationale: Direct answer: complete torch.compile examples for both inference and training on Intel XPU

J3-4.rationale: No docs on float8 quantization + compile interaction or RMS norm NaN issues

J3-6.rationale: FAQ has torch.func+compile section showing happy-path but does NOT warn about silent wrong results

J4-2.rationale: FAQ has DDP strategy section, troubleshooting shows compile-inner-module. Neither addresses _broadcast_coalesced specifically

J4-20.rationale: No docs on Parameter subclasses with Dynamo

J5-13.rationale: AOTInductor page covers compilation path but doesn't discuss runtime overhead vs JIT torch.compile

J5-16.rationale: Custom backend page shows Dynamo-level replacement. Doesn't cover plugging into Inductor's internal pipeline

J5-17.rationale: No docs on Inductor algorithm selection internals

J6-2.rationale: Zero-one specialization page explains size-0 handling but not division-by-zero failure mode

J6-12.rationale: AOTInductor + dynamic shapes documented separately but no content on FP16 autocast perf regression

J6-17.rationale: Zero mentions of DeepSpeed in any compile doc

J7-2.rationale: Covers general slow compilation debugging. Doesn't address exponential growth from specific op chains

J7-20.rationale: Zero mentions of GIL in any compile doc. No content on threading during compilation

J8-5.rationale: API page documents flex_attention and BlockMask. No discussion of dynamic shapes limitations

J8-8.rationale: torch.cond page lists invariants. Neither catalogs specific error messages or compile limitations
